transcript: Storbritannia Storbritannia Storbritannia Storbritannia Storbritannia Storbritannia Storbritannia something nice for you. Do you like it? I just want to make you happy. You're my everything. I can't wait for our life together. We're going to have a house and three kids and I'll come home to you every day. And it'll be all we ever wanted. What do you say? I can't do it. Can't do what, love? I don't't I don't want that with you anymore I see is there someone else no there's there's no one else I just I need to move on to the next chapter of my life you have been so so wonderful to me but if I continue down this path that you've laid out for us, I'll never be able to do the things that I want. I want to focus on my career and not rush into that sort of life. And I don't want to make you wait for the things that you want. Listen, you have all the right qualifications, but we don't really have it in the budget to hire someone who's going to need paid maternity leave in what seems in a matter of days. Come back in a year or two. Please, I graduated from UC Berkeley with a degree in CS and a 4.0, I have an MBA from Yale. I'm more than qualified to take this position. And my due date is for another couple of months. Can you call the hospital? Nick! Nick, please! You're the one who didn't want a future with me. Not my baby, not my problem. Sorry, sweetheart. not my problem sorry sweetheart Please, please, please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please please I don't know. Thank you for watching. © transcript Emily Beynon

Come back in a year or two. Please, I graduated from UC Berkeley with a degree in CS and a 4.0, I have an MBA from Yale. I'm more than qualified to take this position. And my due date is for another couple of months.
You're the one who didn't want a future with me.
